## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Proof

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or checks, or explained why none apply.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing, policy, setup, or prompt changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, live credentials, private data, or local machine state.
- [ ] I did not weaken scope, proof, quality, safety, or delivery gates without explicit maintainer approval.

## Contribution

- [ ] My commits include `Signed-off-by:` lines, or I am ready to amend them if requested.
- [ ] I have the right to submit these changes under Apache 2.0.
- [ ] Any use of the ULTRAPROMPT name or branding follows `TRADEMARKS.md`.
